name: invariant_total_assets_conservation
summary: LendingVault.total_assets == fixture-tracked sum of deposits − sum of withdrawals
rationale: Detected balance-bearing field `LendingVault.total_assets: u64` on an account mutated by movement-class instructions (deposit, withdraw). A correct implementation keeps this field in lock-step with the net amount transferred in via these instructions; any drift is a balance-conservation violation. The fixture walks `expected_total_assets` through `action_deposit`/`action_withdraw` and asserts equality after every action.

name: invariant_cumulative_yield_monotonic
summary: LendingVault.cumulative_yield never decreases across successive observations
rationale: Detected lifetime/cumulative-flavored field `LendingVault.cumulative_yield: u64` on an account mutated by program instructions (deposit, withdraw). Fields with this naming convention are ratchet-only — a correct implementation never decreases them. The fixture snapshots `last_seen_cumulative_yield` after `setup` and each action; any subsequent observation that violates monotonic ≥ is the bug.

name: invariant_withdraw_rejects_unauthorized
summary: withdraw rejects when invoked by anyone other than the authorized signer
rationale: Detected authority-gated instruction `withdraw` (name signals a privileged mutation). The emitted fuzz fixture probes with a freshly-generated attacker `Keypair` (never the vault depositor / authority) and asserts the call returns an error. Any success is an access-control violation — the program failed to verify the signer.

name: invariant_set_admin_rejects_unauthorized
summary: set_admin rejects when invoked by anyone other than the authorized signer
rationale: Detected authority-gated instruction `set_admin` (name signals a privileged mutation).
